# GET /api/v1/notifications/templates/{id}

**Get notification template by ID**

جلب قالب إشعار بالمعرف - API-NOTIF-010

Operation ID: `getById`

**Authentication**

Required (Bearer Authentication).

**Required permission(s)**: NOTIFICATION_TEMPLATE_VIEW (found on service:NotificationTemplateService)

## Path Parameters

| Name | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| id | integer | Yes |  |

## Response `200` — OK

Shape: `NotificationTemplateResponse`

| Field | Type | Required | Constraints | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| id | integer (int64) | No |  | Template ID |
| templateCode | string | No |  | Unique, immutable natural code |
| templateNameAr | string | No |  | Template display name (Arabic) |
| templateNameEn | string | No |  | Template display name (English) |
| channelTypeId | string | No |  | Target channel (LOV-NOTIF-001) |
| moduleCode | string | No |  | Owning module code |
| templateBodyAr | string | No |  | Template body, Arabic |
| templateBodyEn | string | No |  | Template body, English |
| fileFk | integer (int64) | No |  | DEFERRED FK to FileDocument (File Service) — XM-NOTIF-001, unused Phase 1 |
| isActiveFl | boolean | No |  | Active status |
| createdAt | string (date-time) | No |  | Created timestamp |
| createdBy | string | No |  | Created by |
| updatedAt | string (date-time) | No |  | Updated timestamp |
| updatedBy | string | No |  | Updated by |
